name: geometric_core_protocol
geometric_rationale: Phase 1: reduce malignant basin curvature/depth via metabolic suppression
Phase 2: apply entropic stress/noise to induce basin escape (Kramers mechanism)
Phase 3: apply immune vector force to stabilize healthy attractor occupancy

phase_1_flatten.mechanism: Curvature reduction via glycolysis reversal and OXPHOS restoration
phase_1_flatten.measured_effect: Curvature drops 0.08-0.12 across all 6 cancer types

phase_2_heat.mechanism: Entropic noise injection to destabilize flattened basin

phase_3_push.measured_effect: Escape rate improved 1.7-2.5x across all cancer types

universal_correction_pattern.target_1: ROS→ROS diagonal: top sparse correction target in 5/6 cancer types
universal_correction_pattern.target_2: Lactate→Lactate diagonal: top target in 4/6 cancer types
universal_correction_pattern.target_3: Pyruvate→Lactate coupling: appears in top-5 targets for all 6 types
universal_correction_pattern.interpretation: ROS clearance restoration + lactate clearance restoration form the universal core correction
